meaning: n.一种轻马车(通常有车蓬,尤指单马双轮者)
examples: She proceeded to recline on a chaise longue.
Even a walk on the beach can be invigorating for a chaise potato.
In a moment they were all out of the chaise, rejoicing at the sight of each other.
There are no beach chaise lounges or ice-cream vendors infesting the coves but there is Internet and phone.
In a list of "troublesome terms, " "chaise lounge" is preceded by the word "NEVER" in red.
